pages.text: $(bold)Bloodshroom Seed$()$(br2)The blood-slime tree of the nether. A Tinkers' slime tree.
pages.title: Bloodshroom Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant this seed to raise its dynamic tree.$(br2)$(bold)Convert:$() this seed + $(italic)Netherrack$() → $(italic)Blood Slime Sapling$() (shapeless, one-way).
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
